mapper.select: SELECT PLACE_ID, KAKAO_PLACE_ID, PLACE_NAME, PLACE_ADDRESS, PLACE_LAT, PLACE_LNG FROM PLACE WHERE KAKAO_PLACE_ID = #{kakaoPlaceId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PLACE(KAKAO_PLACE_ID, PLACE_NAME, PLACE_ADDRESS, PLACE_LAT, PLACE_LNG) VALUES(#{kakaoPlaceId}, #{placeName}, #{placeAddress}, #{placeLat}, #{placeLng})
